fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the physical inventory order to which the comment applies.

fields.name: Recording No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the physical inventory recording to which the comment applies.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the comment.
